# CORE UI

> An 8.4 MB single-DLL Windows desktop UI framework with a pure C API (250+ functions) and a declarative `.ui` markup language. Purpose-built to be driven by LLMs and AI agents: all public types are plain C (uint64_t handles, POD structs), all UI can be described as XML, and a single file (`docs/ai-guide.md`) contains everything an AI needs to generate a complete application. Since 1.1.0, a full event-injection API (`ui_debug_*`, 60+ functions) lets agents operate any control without real mouse / keyboard, enabling closed-loop UI generation: emit code → build → click / type / screenshot → self-verify.

Why this matters for AI code generation:

- **Pure C ABI** — no C++ templates, no std::*, no inheritance; LLMs rarely hallucinate type errors.
- **Declarative `.ui` XML** — UI = a tree of tagged elements with attributes; trivially generable.
- **One-file cheatsheet** — `docs/ai-guide.md` is the only file an agent needs to fetch.
- **Hot reload** — agents can iterate on `.ui` files without rebuilding.
- **Stable naming** — `ui_<noun>_<verb>` / `Ui<Noun>` patterns; predictable and greppable.

## For AI agents (start here)

- [AI Quick Start (complete cheatsheet)](docs/ai-guide.md): single-file, self-contained guide with the full control list, markup grammar, C API catalog, and 3 complete runnable examples. **Fetch this first.**
- [Debug & Automation](docs/debug-simulation.md): event-injection API — how an agent can click / type / select menu items / screenshot programmatically to verify its own generated UI.
- [API Index](UI_CORE_API.md): full list of exported C functions, grouped by module.
- [C API Reference](docs/c-api.md): parameter-level detail for every function.
- [Markup Reference](docs/markup.md): `.ui` XML grammar, all tags and attributes.

## Docs

- [Getting Started](docs/getting-started.md): integration guide (CMake + MSVC / clang-cl).
- [Controls](docs/controls.md): per-control spec (properties, events, defaults).
- [Layout](docs/layout.md): VBox / HBox / Grid / Stack / percentage / absolute positioning.
- [Design System](docs/design-system.md): Fluent 2 color tokens, spacing, typography.
- [Internationalization](docs/i18n.md): `.lang` files and `@key` references.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): version history (`MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH.BUILD`).

## Examples

- [Demo source](demo/app.cpp): event handling, menus, dialogs, theming.
- [Demo markup](demo/app.ui): 9-page application with SplitView navigation.
- [Language packs](demo/lang/): `zh-CN.lang` and `en.lang` samples.

## Meta

- Platform: Windows 10 and later (x86_64).
- Build: CMake 3.20+ with MSVC 2019+ or clang-cl (C++17).
- License: MIT.
- Version: 1.4.0.19 (see [VERSION](VERSION)).
